requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline and Tropical Installation Conditions
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全基线及热带安装条件
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全基線及熱帶安裝條件

summary.en: A Gambia EV charger project should be documented against IEC 61851-1 for general conductive-charging safety and IEC 61851-23 for DC charging equipment. These standards cover control pilot behaviour, protective earthing, isolation monitoring, interlocks, overcurrent and over-temperature protection, emergency stop provisions where applicable, and DC charger safety functions. Because a Gambia-specific EVSE product safety regulation could not be confirmed, IEC evidence is the defensible international baseline for TGSB review, donor procurement, fleet acceptance, and NAWEC/PURA project discussions.
summary.zh: 冈比亚电动汽车充电桩项目应依据IEC 61851-1传导充电通用安全要求和IEC 61851-23直流充电设备要求准备文件。这些标准涵盖控制导引、保护接地、绝缘监测、互锁、过流和过温保护、适用时的急停措施，以及直流充电桩安全功能。由于未能确认冈比亚专门的EVSE产品安全法规，IEC证据是TGSB审查、捐助方采购、车队验收及NAWEC/PURA项目讨论中较稳妥的国际基线。
summary.zht: 甘比亞電動汽車充電樁項目應依據IEC 61851-1傳導充電通用安全要求和IEC 61851-23直流充電設備要求準備文件。這些標準涵蓋控制導引、保護接地、絕緣監測、互鎖、過流和過溫保護、適用時的急停措施，以及直流充電樁安全功能。由於未能確認甘比亞專門的EVSE產品安全法規，IEC證據是TGSB審查、捐助方採購、車隊驗收及NAWEC/PURA項目討論中較穩妥的國際基線。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code)
TGSB conformity or standards adoption route — confirm scope before shipment

summary.en: China's comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023 for conductive charging systems, with China-specific connector, signaling, and communication assumptions. It is useful design evidence but does not by itself prove conformity to IEC 61851 clauses, IEC connector assumptions, tropical environmental ratings, or any Gambia project acceptance requirement.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023传导充电系统要求，其中包含中国特有的接口、信号和通信假设。该文件可作为设计证据，但本身不能证明符合IEC 61851条款、IEC接口假设、热带环境额定要求或任何冈比亚项目验收要求。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023傳導充電系統要求，其中包含中國特有的接口、信號和通訊假設。該文件可作為設計證據，但本身不能證明符合IEC 61851條款、IEC接口假設、熱帶環境額定要求或任何甘比亞項目驗收要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: Prepare an IEC 61851-1 clause matrix, IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC products, accredited safety reports, protective-device ratings, installation instructions, humidity and dust ingress protection evidence, corrosion-resistant materials, ventilation or thermal derating data, and maintenance instructions suitable for coastal West African conditions. A GB/T 18487 report should be mapped clause-by-clause and should not be presented as a direct IEC report.
gap.zh: 应准备IEC 61851-1逐条矩阵、直流产品IEC 61851-23证据、认可安全报告、保护器件额定值、安装说明、湿热和粉尘侵入防护证据、耐腐蚀材料、通风或热降额数据，以及适合西非沿海条件的维护说明。GB/T 18487报告应逐条映射，不应作为直接IEC报告提交。
gap.zht: 應準備IEC 61851-1逐條矩陣、直流產品IEC 61851-23證據、認可安全報告、保護器件額定值、安裝說明、濕熱和粉塵侵入防護證據、耐腐蝕材料、通風或熱降額數據，以及適合西非沿海條件的維護說明。GB/T 18487報告應逐條映射，不應作為直接IEC報告提交。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional / project-required — IEC 61851 evidence is the practical safety baseline; a specific Gambia mandatory EVSE safety regulation was not publicly confirmed
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and is not direct IEC 61851 evidence without a clause-level gap assessment

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat IEC 61851-1 and IEC 61851-23 as the defensible safety baseline for Gambia EVSE projects. GB/T 18487 evidence needs clause mapping, IEC-aligned testing, and tropical-environment documentation before project acceptance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将IEC 61851-1和IEC 61851-23视为冈比亚EVSE项目较稳妥的安全基线。GB/T 18487证据在项目验收前需要逐条映射、IEC体系测试和热带环境文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將IEC 61851-1和IEC 61851-23視為甘比亞EVSE項目較穩妥的安全基線。GB/T 18487證據在項目驗收前需要逐條映射、IEC體系測試和熱帶環境文件。
